why_it_matters: The note claims medication reconciliation confirmed only OTC acetaminophen, so an omitted prescription fluoride gel makes the medication list inaccurate and incomplete.

Justice involvement and a criminal record affecting employment are pertinent social determinants that contextualize this patient's occupational stress and isolation and could change support/referral planning.
The reassuring PRAPARE findings (housed, safe, insured) are incidental normals, and the low social contact is already captured under social isolation.
